steps.title: Spot the time signal
steps.content: The word “Currently” establishes that the sentence describes the frog's range in the present time.

steps.title: Match the verb tense
steps.content: Choice A “includes” is the simple present tense form, which correctly expresses the required present-time meaning. Choices B, C, and D use past or future tenses that contradict this requirement. That matches choice A — A is correct.
